description: AI-OS document tools as OpenAI function-calling schemas (platform-neutral tool contract; translate 1:1 to Gemini function declarations). Back any implementation with the AI-OS MCP server rules: read-only, path-sandboxed to the repo root, official-scope .md only (DOC-PLAT-005).

function.name: list_documents
function.description: List the official AI-OS documents from the Document Registry (SSOT): ID, title, layer, category, status, version, location. Optional filters: layer (e.g. 'Capability'), status (e.g. 'Active').

function.name: get_document
function.description: Return the full text of one official AI-OS document, by Document ID (e.g. 'DOC-CAPA-015') or by repo-relative path (e.g. '00_Core/Core_Identity.md'). Read-only.

function.name: search_documents
function.description: Case-insensitive keyword search across the official AI-OS markdown documents. Returns matching files with the matching lines.
